venueReconciliation.note: SmartShanghai lists Star@ Culture Center for this June 26 Cyber Buddha event, while RA lists Bandai Namco Shanghai Base / Dream Theater with the same core lineup. Do not overwrite the venue until a primary organizer page resolves it.
